zh.Denton, Lancashire, England, United King: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾丹頓
zh.Nantwich, Cheshire, England, United King: 英國英格蘭爾南特維其
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Davenport於1275年出生在英國英格蘭爾時，她的父親John Davenport23歲，母親Matilda de Rode22歲。她於大約1295年與Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury在英國爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1358年在英國英格蘭爾南特維其享年83歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.Nantwich, Cheshire, England, United King: 英国英格兰爾南特維其
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Davenport于1275年出生在英国英格兰爾时，她的父亲John Davenport23岁，母亲Matilda de Rode22岁。她于大约1295年与Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury在英国爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1358年在英国英格兰爾南特維其享年83岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Davenport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Davenport, from the Dane river (apparently named with a Celtic cognate of Middle Welsh dafnu ‘to drop, to trickle’) + Old English port ‘market town’.

Irish: in Tipperary, this is an English surname adopted by bearers of Munster Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh ‘descendant of Donndubhartach’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + dubh ‘black’ + artach ‘nobleman’.
History: John Davenport (died 1670) arrived in Boston, MA, in 1637. He came of an English Cheshire family associated with Capesthorne Hall, near Macclesfield.

variants.name: Devenport
meanings: English and Irish (Lancashire): variant of Davenport . The spelling Devonport is found in Ireland and it may have been this form which gave rise to Devenport.

variants.name: Dunworth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Niall.
Irish: adopted in Ireland by bearers of Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh (see Davenport 2).
English: perhaps a variant of Dungworth, see Dunsworth .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Davenport was born in 1275, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Davenport, was 23 and her mother, Matilda de Rode, was 22. She married Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury about 1295, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1358, in Nantwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 83, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Davenport est née en 1275, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Davenport, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Rode, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury environ 1295, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1358, à Nantwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Davenport 1275 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Davenport 23 und ihre Mutter Matilda de Rode 22. Sie hat um 1295 in Cheshire, England Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1358 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Nantwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Davenport è nata il nel 1275 nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Davenport, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Matilda de Rode, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury circa 1295, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1358, nel Nantwich, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolta a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Davenportが1275年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Davenportは23歳，母Matilda de Rodeは22歳であった。約1295年にイギリスチェシュアイアでSir John Hyde - Lord of Norburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1358年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアナントウィチで83歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Davenport(이)가 1275년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Davenport(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda de Rode(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1295년 영국 체실르에서 Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1358년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 난트위치에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Davenport nasceu em 1275, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Davenport, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Matilda de Rode, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury aproximadamente 1295, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1358, em Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 83 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Davenport родилась в 1275 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Davenport было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Rode, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury около 1295 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1358 г. в местности нантвич, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 83 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Davenport nació en 1275, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Davenport, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Matilda de Rode, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sir John Hyde - Lord of Norbury aproximadamente 1295, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1358, en Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
